---
title: "Short title of your MSDM Project"
subtitle: "Proposal Presentation"
author: "Joe Doe"
institute: "IBM 6400, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: Title of Your Project
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: false
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

# Portfolio Website Vision

This presentation explains my plan to build a professional marketing portfolio website.

The purpose of this website is to showcase my projects, skills, and growth as a marketing student.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Main Goal of the Website

-   Present my marketing work in a professional way\
-   Show my learning journey and academic progress\
-   Build a strong personal brand\
-   Support internship and career opportunities\
-   Demonstrate strategic and analytical thinking\
-   Create a digital marketing presence

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Personal Brand Direction

## How I want to be seen

-   Aspiring marketing strategist\
-   Data-driven decision maker\
-   Creative campaign thinker\
-   Business-focused student\
-   Future sports marketing professional\
-   Growth-oriented learner

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Your Plan for the Website

A well-organized portfolio website should include clear sections that guide recruiters through my experience.

This structure will make my work easy to understand and visually engaging.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Home Page

The home page will include:

-   Short professional introduction\
-   Personal mission statement\
-   Career goals\
-   Featured marketing project\
-   Clear navigation to other pages

This page creates the first impression of my professional identity.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Marketing Projects Page

This section will function like a portfolio blog.

It will include:

-   Marketing campaign projects\
-   Case studies from classes\
-   Data visualizations\
-   Consumer research insights\
-   Strategy development examples

This shows how I apply marketing concepts in real situations.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Dashboard Page

The dashboard will present my analytical work.

It will include:

-   Marketing performance dashboards\
-   KPI tracking examples\
-   Data storytelling visuals\
-   Campaign performance analysis\
-   Interactive marketing insights

This demonstrates technical and analytical marketing skills.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# RevealJS Presentation Section

This section will include presentations like this one.

It allows me to:

-   Present marketing ideas clearly\
-   Practice professional storytelling\
-   Show structured thinking\
-   Communicate strategy visually

This highlights presentation and communication abilities.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Google Analytics Section

This section will demonstrate digital marketing tracking skills.

It will include:

-   Website traffic analysis\
-   User behavior insights\
-   Campaign performance tracking\
-   Conversion metrics\
-   Data-driven decision examples

This shows my understanding of modern marketing analytics.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Why This Website Matters

Creating this portfolio website helps me:

-   Organize my academic work professionally\
-   Prepare for marketing internships\
-   Build an online personal brand\
-   Track my growth as a marketing student\
-   Demonstrate real marketing skills

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Future Improvements

In the future I plan to:

-   Add internship experience projects\
-   Improve visual design and branding\
-   Include more advanced analytics dashboards\
-   Expand marketing case studies\
-   Add interactive data visualizations

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Conclusion

This portfolio website represents my journey toward becoming a marketing strategist.

It combines creativity, analytics, and strategic thinking in one professional platform.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Thank You

Questions or feedback are welcome.
